introSection: Looney Tooter is a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster currently located at Dream Park in Amman, Amman, Jordan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.

fullText:
Looney Tooter is a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster currently located at Dream Park in Amman, Amman, Jordan.



Yellow track and blue supports.

The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.
